title: crotalaria distans subsp. macrotropis
intro: Crotalaria distans subsp. macrotropis is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae, commonly known as a shrub or small tree found in tropical and subtropical regions. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria distans subsp. macrotropis include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying the leaves and stems, then using them in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
